topic: Cost of living and financial language
title: Advanced finance vocabulary
instruction: Match each term to its correct meaning.

pairs.definition: The minimum hourly rate needed to cover basic living costs
Money remaining after taxes and essential spending
A long-term loan used to buy a property
An automatic regular payment from your bank account
Value Added Tax — a tax added to the price of goods
A UK tax deducted from pay that funds NHS and benefits
The amount of money needed for housing, food, transport and other basics
